nodes.headline: The prologue
nodes.blurb: The old Seattle crew, Teddy and James, and the visit that planted the seed for this whole trip. A second swing through on the return leg isn't off the table.

nodes.headline: The hometown check-in
nodes.blurb: You guys are literally on the way — so whether it's a beer on the way out or a long-story dinner on the way back, I'm not passing through without seeing you.
nodes.highlight: Easy — backyard, beer, and drone stories

nodes.headline: The launch pad
nodes.blurb: Where Leg 1 officially lifts off. May 1st I'm rolling into Amity and pointing the car south. First stop, first memory, first real proof this trip is happening.

nodes.headline: An old road, an older friend
nodes.blurb: I-5 doesn't get driven without a Roseburg stop. Whatever window works — an afternoon beer, a dinner, a couple nights on the couch — I'm in.

nodes.headline: Family time
nodes.blurb: Been way too long. Whether it's a quick pass-through meal or a proper weekend with the whole crew, I'd love to meet the family proper and hear how everyone's doing.

nodes.headline: Off the beaten path
nodes.blurb: Murphy's a hidden corner of southern Oregon that most people never see, and that's exactly why I want to see it with you. Show me what's good.

nodes.headline: Homecoming
nodes.blurb: Wine country, slow mornings, Mom's kitchen, Jim's stories. Taking this stop at half speed on purpose — it's a recharge, not a checkbox.

nodes.headline: Midpoint magic
nodes.blurb: May 22, the halfway pin. Sonoma County in late spring is unreasonably good, and you always know the best spots. Hiking, wineries, long conversations.

nodes.headline: The southern anchor
nodes.blurb: The last stop on the mainland — sunshine, tacos, the ocean, and you two. Also the launching point for the flight out to see Adam. Let's make it count.
nodes.highlight: Tacos and ocean before the flight

nodes.headline: The ocean finale
nodes.blurb: Last node. Fly out of San Diego, land in paradise, owe you about a decade of catch-up. Surf, sunset, and a proper finish to Leg 1.
